children.heading: .—Requirement for Management Structure
children.label: a .—Requirement for Management Structure
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall establish and implement a management structure for the procurement of contract services for the Department of Defense. The management structure shall provide, at a minimum, for the matters specified in subsections (b), (c), (d), and (e).

children.heading: .—Policies, Procedures, and Best Practices Guidelines
children.label: b .—Policies, Procedures, and Best Practices Guidelines

children.text: to identify the critical skills and competencies needed to carry out the procurement of contract services on behalf of the Department of Defense;
to develop a comprehensive strategy for recruiting, training, and deploying employees to meet the requirements for such skills and competencies; and

to ensure that the military departments and Defense Agencies have staff and administrative support that are adequate to effectively perform their duties under this section and .section 4502 of this title

children.heading: .—Contract Services Acquisition Categories
children.label: d .—Contract Services Acquisition Categories
children.text: The management structure implemented pursuant to subsection (a) shall provide that the Under Secretary shall establish contract services acquisition categories, based on dollar thresholds, for the purpose of establishing the level of review, decision authority, and applicable procedures in such categories.

children.heading: .—Oversight of Implementation
children.label: e .—Oversight of Implementation
children.text: The management structure implemented pursuant to subsection (a) shall provide that the Under Secretary shall oversee the implementation of the requirements of this section and and the policies, procedures, and best practices guidelines established pursuant to subsection (b).section 4502 of this title

children.heading: .—Contract Services
children.label: f .—Contract Services
children.text: In this section, the term “contract services” has the meaning given that term in .section 4502(d)(2) of this title
